name: pinesemi
tagline: Advanced Power Semiconductor Solutions for a Sustainable Future
description: PineSemi is a leading Chinese power semiconductor company specializing in silicon carbide (SiC) MOSFETs, IGBTs, and power modules for automotive, industrial, and renewable energy applications.
longDescription: PineSemi (派恩杰) is a pioneering power semiconductor company headquartered in China, dedicated to developing cutting-edge wide bandgap and silicon-based power devices. Founded by industry veterans with extensive experience in power electronics, PineSemi has established itself as a key player in the rapidly evolving power semiconductor market. The company's product portfolio encompasses advanced SiC MOSFETs with industry-leading performance characteristics, high-efficiency IGBT modules for industrial drives and renewable energy systems, and intelligent power modules (IPMs) that integrate drive and protection functions. PineSemi's products are widely adopted in electric vehicles, charging infrastructure, solar and wind energy systems, industrial motor drives, and data center power supplies. With a strong focus on R&D and quality, PineSemi holds numerous patents in power device design and manufacturing processes. The company's state-of-the-art fabrication facilities and comprehensive testing capabilities ensure products meet the highest standards of reliability and performance. As a strategic partner for many leading OEMs, PineSemi continues to drive innovation in power electronics, enabling more efficient and sustainable energy solutions worldwide.

coreProducts.name: SiC MOSFETs
coreProducts.description: Silicon carbide power MOSFETs with low on-resistance, fast switching, and high-temperature operation for EV, renewable energy, and industrial applications.

coreProducts.name: IGBT Modules
coreProducts.description: Insulated gate bipolar transistor modules for high-power applications including motor drives, inverters, and power supplies.

coreProducts.name: Intelligent Power Modules
coreProducts.description: Integrated power modules combining power devices with gate drivers and protection circuits for simplified system design.

coreProducts.name: SiC Diodes
coreProducts.description: Silicon carbide Schottky diodes with zero reverse recovery and high surge capability for power factor correction and rectification.

industries.name: Electric Vehicles
industries.description: Power semiconductors for EV traction inverters, onboard chargers, DC-DC converters, and charging infrastructure.

industries.name: Renewable Energy
industries.description: High-efficiency power devices for solar inverters, wind turbine converters, and energy storage systems.

industries.name: Industrial Drives
industries.description: Power modules and IGBTs for motor drives, servo systems, and industrial automation equipment.

industries.name: Data Centers
industries.description: High-efficiency power solutions for server power supplies, UPS systems, and data center infrastructure.

certifications.name: IATF 16949
certifications.description: Automotive quality management system certification for automotive semiconductor production.

certifications.name: ISO 9001
certifications.description: Quality management system certification ensuring consistent product quality and customer satisfaction.

certifications.name: AEC-Q101
certifications.description: Automotive Electronics Council qualification for discrete semiconductors used in automotive applications.

certifications.name: RoHS Compliant
certifications.description: Restriction of Hazardous Substances compliance ensuring environmental safety.

seoTitle: PineSemi SiC MOSFET & IGBT Distributor | Power Semiconductor Solutions
seoDescription: Authorized PineSemi distributor offering SiC MOSFETs, IGBT modules, and intelligent power modules for EV, renewable energy, and industrial applications. Technical support and competitive pricing.

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo an authorized distributor of PineSemi products?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is an authorized distributor of PineSemi power semiconductor products. As a strategic distribution partner, we provide genuine PineSemi SiC MOSFETs, IGBT modules, and intelligent power modules with full manufacturer warranty and technical support. Our authorization ensures customers receive authentic products with traceability, quality assurance, and access to the latest product releases. We maintain inventory of popular PineSemi products and can support both prototype quantities and high-volume production requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us for PineSemi product availability, pricing, and technical documentation. We can also provide samples for evaluation.

faqs.question: What are the key advantages of PineSemi SiC MOSFETs?
faqs.answer: PineSemi SiC MOSFETs offer several key advantages over traditional silicon devices: 1) Lower on-resistance (Rds(on)) for reduced conduction losses; 2) Faster switching speeds enabling higher frequency operation and smaller passive components; 3) Higher temperature capability (up to 175°C junction temperature) for improved thermal performance; 4) Zero reverse recovery charge in the body diode, eliminating switching losses; 5) Compact chip sizes for high power density designs. These characteristics make PineSemi SiC MOSFETs ideal for EV traction inverters, onboard chargers, DC-DC converters, and solar inverters where efficiency and power density are critical.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for detailed technical comparisons and application-specific recommendations for PineSemi SiC devices.

faqs.question: How do PineSemi products compare to international competitors?
faqs.answer: PineSemi products offer competitive performance compared to international brands while providing better cost-effectiveness and local support. PineSemi SiC MOSFETs achieve industry-leading Rds(on) specifications and switching performance comparable to leading international suppliers. The company's IGBT modules feature advanced trench-gate field-stop technology for low conduction and switching losses. PineSemi's advantages include: competitive pricing due to domestic manufacturing, faster lead times for Chinese customers, localized technical support, and flexible customization options. The company has passed rigorous automotive certifications (AEC-Q101, IATF 16949) demonstrating quality parity with established international suppliers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request a detailed comparison analysis for your specific application to evaluate PineSemi products against alternatives.

faqs.question: What applications are best suited for PineSemi SiC MOSFETs?
faqs.answer: PineSemi SiC MOSFETs excel in applications requiring high efficiency, high frequency, and high power density: Electric vehicle traction inverters (main drive motors); Onboard chargers and DC-DC converters in EVs; EV charging stations (DC fast chargers); Solar and wind power inverters; Industrial motor drives and servo systems; Data center power supplies and UPS; High-frequency power supplies and welders. The superior switching performance of SiC enables system-level benefits including smaller magnetics, reduced cooling requirements, and higher overall efficiency. For cost-sensitive applications where switching frequency is low, PineSemi's IGBT products may offer better value.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for application-specific guidance on selecting between PineSemi SiC and IGBT products.

faqs.question: What technical support does BeiLuo provide for PineSemi products?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive technical support for PineSemi products including: Application engineering support - schematic review, PCB layout guidance, and thermal design assistance; Product selection guidance - helping choose the right device for your specific requirements; Evaluation support - providing reference designs, evaluation boards, and application notes; Failure analysis - investigating any issues and working with PineSemi for resolution; Supply chain support - forecasting, inventory planning, and long-term supply agreements. Our FAE team has extensive experience with power electronics design and can provide valuable insights for optimizing your designs with PineSemi devices.
faqs.decisionGuide: Reach out to our technical support team for assistance with your PineSemi-based design projects.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for PineSemi products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for PineSemi products vary based on product type and order quantity: Standard catalog products (popular SiC MOSFETs and IGBTs): 4-8 weeks from factory; High-volume production orders: 8-12 weeks with scheduled deliveries; New or custom products: 12-16 weeks including qualification; Samples and small quantities: 1-2 weeks from distributor stock. As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo maintains inventory of popular PineSemi products for immediate delivery. For production requirements, we recommend establishing forecasts and supply agreements to ensure continuous supply. Contact us for current lead times and inventory availability for specific part numbers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for current lead times and to discuss inventory programs for your production requirements.

faqs.question: Does PineSemi offer automotive-grade products?
faqs.answer: Yes, PineSemi offers a comprehensive range of automotive-grade power semiconductors qualified to AEC-Q101 standards. The automotive product portfolio includes: SiC MOSFETs for EV traction inverters (650V-1200V ratings); SiC diodes for onboard chargers and DC-DC converters; IGBT modules for auxiliary inverters and power steering; Intelligent power modules for HVAC and thermal management. All automotive products are manufactured in IATF 16949 certified facilities and undergo rigorous reliability testing including high-temperature reverse bias, temperature cycling, and humidity testing. PineSemi automotive products are already deployed in production vehicles from several leading EV manufacturers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us for automotive product specifications, qualification reports, and PPAP documentation.
